message:
fix(types): Fix remaining TypeScript transaction type compatibility

- Update IDatabaseConnection.transaction to use 'any' for backend compatibility
- Fix quic-sync-example.ts to await createDatabase() calls
- Add commit message validation script (validate-commit-msg.cjs)
- Update Husky hook to use .cjs extension
- Resolve 3 remaining TypeScript compilation errors
- Achieves 100% clean TypeScript build (0 errors)

TypeScript Status: ✅ 0 errors (was 43)
Impact: Production builds now succeed without errors

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,6 @@
 echo "🔍 Validating commit message..."
 
 # Validate commit message format
-node scripts/validate-commit-msg.js "$1"
+node scripts/validate-commit-msg.cjs "$1"
 
 echo "✅ Commit message is valid!"
